message:
feat(distributed): implement session checkpoint save/restore with aggregator state

Add distributed_save_session_checkpoint() and
distributed_restore_session_checkpoint() for persisting and recovering
distributed listener session state across restarts. Checkpoints capture
aggregator session snapshots, replay guard state, and scope metadata.
Restore rebuilds the aggregator and replay guard from checkpoint data.

Add checkpoint_save_restore_preserves_aggregator_and_replay_guard
integration test verifying full roundtrip. Refactor scope pruning to
use the new session snapshot API for stale detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
